awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome CMake resources, scripts, modules and examples.
awesomeList.description: A curated list of awesome CMake resources, scripts, modules and examples.

nodes.itemHTML: • toolchainsstars61 - For cross-compiling with CMake. They are meant to be mainly used on ArchLinux. [NO LICENSE]

• ModernCppStarterstars1.9k - A template for modern C++ projects using CMake, CI, code coverage, clang-format, reproducible dependency management, tests using docteststars3.2k and much more. [UNLICENSE]
• Official Discourse Forum
• Tutorial - Modern CMake tutorials part1: CMake basics
• Arduino-CMake-Toolchainstars66 - CMake toolchain for all official and 3rd party Arduino platforms. [MIT]
• Tutorialstars9 - Tutorial and Example on How to Properly Use Modern CMake.
• Article - A list of common CMake antipatterns (from 2013 but still relevant).
• FAQ
• Wiki
• cmake-maven-pluginstars44 - CMake integration for Maven builds. [APACHE2]
• Lecture - Oh No! More Modern CMake (slides)- by Deniz Bahadir, Meeting C++ 2019.
• cmake-language-serverstars90 - CMake Language Server Protocol Implementation. [MIT]
• FindIDLstars8 - CMake module for building IDL files with MIDL and generating CLR DLL using Tlbimp. [MIT]
• pmmstars10 - PMM is a module for CMake that manages... package managers. [MIT]
• CMakeCMstars1 - CMake Community Modules. [NO LICENSE]
• CMakeCooking - Flexible development environments for CMake projects with external dependencies
• cpmstars630 - A setup-free CMake + git dependency manager. [MIT]
• cpp-projectstars352 - Boiler plate for C++ projects - tests, CI, coverage, docs. [UNLICENSE]
• Metabenchstars151 - CMake module for compile-time microbenchmarks. [BOOST]
• Lecture - More Modern CMake (slides & examplesstars128)- by Deniz Bahadir, Meeting C++ 2018.
• ixmstars77 - Make CMake less painful when trying to write Modern Flexible CMake. [MIT]
• cmake-examplesstars866 - A collection of as simple as possible, modern CMake projects. [MIT]
• Article - Modifying the default CMake build types/flags, toolchains and patches - Oh my! - by Cristian Adam.

• how-to-export-cpp-librarystars238 - An OS-agnostic template project for exporting either shared, static or header-only C++ library, sporting ctest and CI support, written in plain CMake with line-by-line tutorial comments. [MIT]
• UseLATEX - Collection of CMake macros to simplify building LaTeX files. [BSD3]
• pitchforkstars503 - A set of conventions for native C and C++ projects. [MIT]
• cmake_checkstars20 - Static analysis (linter) for the CMake language (e.g. to enforce modern CMake rules). [MIT]
• cpp-templatestars30 - A template C++ repository, using CMake and Catch. [NO LICENSE]
• FindWiXstars8 - CMake module for building Windows Installer packages with WiX toolset. [BSD3]
• YouTube Series - How to CMake Good. [CC0-1.0]
• Web Bookstars437 - CGold: The Hitchhiker’s Guide to the CMake. [BSD2]
• Article - Easily supporting CMake install and find_package().
• Article - Easy dependency management for C++ with CMake and Git.
• Article - Opt-in header-only libraries with CMake.
• Article - Ultimate Guide to Modern CMake.
• Article - How to Build a CMake-Based Project.
• Article - Learn CMake's Scripting Language in 15 Minutes.
• Article - The architecture of CMake.
• Lecture - Effective CMake - by Daniel Pfeifer, C++Now 2017.
• Article - Building Cross-Platform CUDA Applications with CMake.
• Tutorial - A step-by-step guide for understanding CMake.
• Article + Lecture - Embracing Modern CMake - by Stephen Kelly.
• Lecture - Modern CMake for Modular Design - by Mathieu Ropert, CppCon 2017.
• Article - It's Time To Do CMake Right (one of the best articles about CMake).
• Lecture - Introduction to CMake - by Florent Castelli, C++ Sweden 2018.
• Article - Some nice and accurate CMake tips.
• Article - Modern CMake for Library Developers.
• Article - Effective Modern CMake: a great summary of most good practices - by Manuel Binna.
• Book - Professional CMake: A Practical Guide (paid).
• Book - Effective CMake: Practical Advice to Write Better CMake (not fully written yet).
• Web Book - An Introduction to Modern CMake.
• YCMstars34 - Extra CMake Modules for Yet Another Robot Platformstars365 and friends. [BSD3]
• cmake-cookbookstars1.2k - A huge CMake cookbook full of recipes. [MIT]

• Articles - A series on CMake - by Martin Hořeňovský
    • Basic CMake usage.
    • Basic CMake, part 2: libraries.
• cmake_snippetsstars44 - Short copy-pasteable CMake snippets. [BSD3]
• cmake_templatesstars90 - Templates for creating C++ libraries and executables (including conan). [NO LICENSE]
• cmake-checks-cachestars47 - CMake checks cache helper modules. [MIT]
• vcpkgstars12.7k - A tool to acquire and build C++ open source libraries. Uses CMake internally as a build script language. [MIT]
• cpp14-project-templatestars51 - A C++14 template with CI, tests, code coverage, docs and static analysis integration. [CC0-1.0]
• CMakeInstallExamplestars22 - Installation example for a C++ project (Windows) with Cmake. [NO LICENSE]
• modern-cmake-samplestars483 - Best practices and proper usage of CMake by using targets. [NO LICENSE]
• cpp-boilerplatestars200 - Template that aims to be a reference for modern CMake and CI. [MIT]
• cmake-getstars58 - Get dependencies in config or script mode. [NO LICENSE]
• cppan - C++ Archive Network - C++ Package Manager based on CMake, implemented in C++14. [APACHE2]
• osg-3rdparty-cmakestars129 - CMake scripts for building OpenSceneGraph third party libraries. [MIXED LICENSE]
• Modern CMakestars181 - Modern CMake PDF and samples by the creator of cmakeppstars368. [MIT]
• Stack Overflow
• Latest Documentation
• Webinars
• #cmake on Freenode
• /r/cmake on Reddit
• /r/cpp on Reddit

• Ninjastars6.8k - Build system that differs from others in two major respects: it is designed to have its input files generated by a higher-level build system (like CMake), and it is designed to run builds as fast as possible. [APACHE2]
• hunterstars1.9k - Cross-platform package manager for C++ (based on CMake ExternalProject). [BSD2]
• cgetstars368 - CMake package retrieval. This can be used to download and install CMake packages. [BOOST]
• cpmstars699 - C++ Package Manager based on CMake and Git. [MIT]
• conanstars4.9k - Conan C++ Package Manager, implemented in Python and has a CMake integration backend. [MIT]
• fipsstars382 - High-level build system/dependency management for distributed, multi-platform C/C++ projects. [MIT]

• cmake-modulesstars749 - Ryan Pavlik's collection of CMake modules. There are a number of find modules, especially for virtual reality and physical simulation, some utility modules, and some patches or workarounds for CMake itself. [BOOST]
• cmake-modulesstars333 - This is a collection of additional CMake modules. Most of them are from Ryan Pavlik. [BOOST]
• CMakestars138 - Eyescale's common CMake modules. [BSD3]
• cmake-modulesstars76 - CMake modules for some scientific libraries. [BSD2]
• cgcmakestars99 - CMake modules for common applications related to computer graphics. [MIT]
• FindMathematicastars41 - CMake module for Mathematica. [MIT]
• extra-cmake-modulesstars76 - KDE's extra modules and scripts for CMake. [BSD3]
• FindICU.cmakestars27 - CMake module to find International Components for Unicode (ICU) Library. [BSD2]
• FindTBBstars78 - CMake find module for Intel Threading Building Blocks. [MIT]
• cmake-modulesstars30 - hanjianwei's CMake module collection. [MIT]

• cotirestars1.2k - Cotire (compile time reducer) is a CMake module that speeds up the build process of CMake based build systems by fully automating techniques as precompiled headers and unity builds for C and C++. [MIT]
• ucmstars188 - For managing compiler/linker flags, collecting sources, precompiled headers, unity builds and others. [MIT]
• cmakeppstars368 - Enhancement Suite for the CMake Build System. [MIT]
• sugarstars102 - CMake tools and examples: collecting source files, warnings suppression, etc. [BSD2]
• DownloadProjectstars396 - CMake module for downloading an external project's source at configure time. [MIT]
• buildemstars27 - Modular CMake-based system that leverages ExternalProject to simplify builds. [LICENSE]
• coveralls-cmakestars78 - Coveralls JSON coverage generator and uploader for CMake. [MIT]
• compatibilitystars71 - Improved version of cmake-compile-features. [LICENSE]
• cmake-modulesstars40 - LibFindMacros development repository and other cool CMake stuff. [LICENSE]
• GreatCMakeCookOffstars40 - This is a repository of useful and less than useful CMake recipes. [MIT]
• cppcheck-target-cmakestars18 - Per-target CPPCheck for CMake. [MIT]
• clang-tidy-target-cmakestars15 - Add clang-tidy checks to a target using CMake. [MIT]
• cmake-unitstars32 - Unit testing framework for CMake. [MIT]
• cmake-header-languagestars4 - CMake macro to determine the language of a header file. [MIT]
• tooling-cmake-utilstars3 - Utility and common library for all polysquare CMake tools. [MIT]
• iwyu-target-cmakestars8 - CMake integration for include-what-you-use. [MIT]
• sanitizers-cmakestars238 - CMake module to enable sanitizers for binary targets. [MIT]
• cmake-precompiled-headerstars154 - Visual Studio and GCC precompiled header macro. [LICENSE]
• CMakePCHCompilerstars105 - CMake precompiled headers via custom compiler extension - with reuse support! [MIT]
• CMake-codecovstars71 - Enables code coverage and generates coverage reports with CMake targets. [GPL]
• dockcrossstars2.1k - Cross compiling toolchains in Docker images. [MIT]
• android-cmakestars1.1k - CMake toolchain file and other scripts for the Android NDK. [BSD3]
• ios-cmakestars285 - Toolchain file and examples using CMake for iOS development. [BSD3]
• qt-android-cmakestars186 - For building and deploying Qt based apps on Android without QtCreator. [LICENSE]
• mingw-w64-cmake - CMake-based MinGW-w64 Cross Toolchain - to build Windows binaries of mpv. [ISC]
• cmake-avrstars140 - CMake toolchain for AVR. [LICENSE]
• arduino-cmakestars51 - This is the CMake project settings for the Arduino platform. [MPL]
• pollystars786 - Collection of CMake toolchain files and scripts for cross-platform build and CI testing. [BSD2]
• cmake - Collection of CMake toolchain files, mostly for static linking. [APACHE2]
• cmake-initstars656 - Template for reliable, cross-platform C++ project setup using CMake. [LICENSE]
• android-cmakestars28 - Examples of using ruslo/hunterstars1.9k package manager for an Android application. [BSD2]
• hunter-simplestars42 - Example of downloading/installing dependencies using ruslo/hunterstars1.9k package manager. [BSD2]
• package-examplestars305 - Config mode of find_package (examples for this Stack Overflow question). [NO LICENSE]
• minimal_cmake_examplestars143 - Minimal CMake example, that covers dependencies and packaging. [CC0-1.0]
• cmake-examplestars131 - Example project which demonstrates various CMake features. [BSD3]
• cmake-examplesstars5k - Useful CMake examples in a tutorial format. [MIT]
• mini-cmake-qtstars159 - Minimal CMake template for Qt 5 projects. [LICENSE]
• BASISstars35 - CMake BASIS makes it easy to create sharable software and libraries that work together. [BSD2]

• autocmakestars33 - Using a autocmake.yml file Autocmake composes CMake building blocks into a CMake project and generates CMakeLists.txt as well as a setup script, which serves as a front-end to CMakeLists.txt. [BSD3]
• scikit-buildstars242 - Improved build system generator for CPython C extensions. [MIT]
• node-cmakestars67 - CMake-based build system for node.js native modules. [ISC]
• cmake-font-lockstars36 - Advanced syntax coloring support for CMake scripts inside Emacs. [GPL]
• autovalastars107 - Program that automatically generates CMake configuration files for your Vala project. [GPL]
• catkinstars234 - CMake-based build system that is used to build all packages in Robot Operating System (ROS). [BSD3]
• suitesparse-metis-for-windowsstars328 - CMake scripts for painless usage of SuiteSparse+METIS. [BSD3]
• cmake-dstars51 - CMake for D2. [MIT]
• cmakeprojectmanager2stars67 - Enhanced CMake Project Manager plugin for Qt Creator. [NO LICENSE]
• cmake-lintstars96 - Check for coding style issues in CMake files. cmakelint requires Python. [APACHE2]
• git-cmake-formatstars48 - Integrate clang-format into your CMake project hosted in a git repository. [LICENSE]
• configure-cmakestars79 - configure-cmake is an autotools-style configure script for CMake-based projects. [CC0-1.0]
• cmake-aststars26 - Python module to reduce a CMake file to an AST. [MIT]
